revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2020 September 15#The arts]] closed as not renamed
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing the category recursion error
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category::" to "Category:"
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Portal|Arts}} This [[Help:Category|category]] is for the '''[[:en:18th century|18th century]]''' in '''[[the arts]]'''. {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:18th century|Arts]] [[Category:Arts by century|18]] [[Category:2nd millennium in the arts]] [[Category:11 fixed]]
}} [[sn:18th century in the arts]] [[en:18th century in the arts]] [[Category:Categories with 4 members]] [[en:Category:18th century in the arts]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Portal|Arts}} This [[Help:Category|category]] is for the '''[[:en:18th century|18th century]]''' in '''[[the arts]]'''. {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:18th century|Arts]] [[Category:Arts by century|18]] [[Category:2nd millennium in the arts]] [[Category:11 fixed]] }} [[sn:18th century in the arts]] [[en:18th century in the arts]] [[Category:Categories with 4 members]] [[en:Category:18th century in the arts]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category 11 fixed
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q16915567)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Arts}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{wikidata link|Q16915567}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:18th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:18th century in the arts]] [[Help:Category|category]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST18th century in the arts]] [[Category:18th century|Arts]] [[Category:2nd millennium in the arts]] [[Category:Arts by century|18]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th_century_in_the_arts here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th_century_in_the_arts for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Portal|Arts}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{wikidata link|Q16915567}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:18th century in the arts]] [[en:Category:18th century in the arts]] [[Help:Category|category]] <!--categories--> [[Category:18th century|Arts]] [[Category:2nd millennium in the arts]] [[Category:Arts by century|18]]
